name: Victory Transport Svc
principals: Sam McCoy (Owner, Director of San Antonio Operations)
recent_news: Active NEMT operator focused on medical appointments, dialysis, hospital discharges and senior transport; no school-bus/SPED contracts disclosed.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Pure NEMT van service in Silsbee/San Antonio/Beaumont TX. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: Sea Life Limousine
recent_news: No public web footprint located beyond directory listings; presumed micro-limo operator in San Juan Bautista CA.
fit_notes: Name and SIC indicate a charter-party limousine carrier, not a school-bus contractor. 4 employees, ~$201K revenue. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: Safe & Reliable Cab & Limo
recent_news: Operates as Safe & Reliable Transportation LLC / Safe And Reliable Limousine; serves Sandusky from Elyria-area base. Limo/party-bus events focus, not school routes.
fit_notes: Limo/cab event-charter business, not a yellow-bus or SPED contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: Red Rock Limousine Svc

fit_notes: Limo SIC, 5 employees, ~$200K revenue; no evidence of school/SPED contracting. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: Savage Transport Svc LLC
recent_news: FMCSA-registered (USDOT 2543684) micro-carrier operating from owner residence at 4821 Gilray Dr, Baltimore; no school district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Likely owner-operator NEMT/paratransit van service, not a school-bus contractor. 3 employees, ~$199K revenue. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.
